programme.title: 2002. Narak diz a Sesshomaru que ele devolverá Rin se ele matar Inuyasha, mas Sesshomaru se recusa e vai até o castelo dele. Enquanto isso, Agome detecta a presença da Jóia. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Sesshomaru e o Sequestro de Rin
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E26

programme.title: 2002. Narak está tentando absorver Sesshomaru para que ele possa obter os poderes de um youkai completo. Mas Inuyasha rompe sua barreira e interfere. Quando Narak vê que o jogo foi virado, ele foge. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E27

programme.title: 2002. Agome retorna aos dias atuais. Ela está ocupada se preparando para um simulado de dois dias. Enquanto isso, Sango está preocupada com Kohaku, que foi levado por Kagura. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: A Conexão Entre o Presente e a Época das Guerras
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E01

programme.title: 2002. Ayame, uma youkai loba, aparece diante de Kuga e diz a ele que é sua noiva. Mas Kuga é loucamente apaixonado por Agome. Em sua fuga, Kuga encontra o castelo de Narak. Ayame vai atrás dele e é atacada por um youkai. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: A Youkai Loba e a Grande Promessa
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E02

programme.title: 2002. Ayame leva Kuga para parar a luta de seus companheiros. Mas ela não tem intenção de retornar para ele. O youkai que estava atrás dos fragmentos da Jóia ataca. Kuga luta para proteger Agome e Ayame. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: A Proposta de Casamento Super Veloz
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E03

programme.title: 2002. Inuyasha e seu grupo conhecem uma senhora que é uma falsa exorcista. A fim de descobrir por que tantos youkais apareceram recentemente, eles vão ao Castelo que parece ser a origem desse problema. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: O Aumento da Energia Maligna; A Cabeça do Demônio
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E04

programme.title: 2002. Inuyasha luta contra o senhor do Castelo. Sango ouve que Mirok foi para o porão com a princesa e vai atrás dele. Agome encontra o cadáver da verdadeira princesa no quarto do lorde. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E05

programme.title: 2002. Enquanto procura por Narak, Kikyo conhece Kansuke, um velho bandido que está gravemente doente. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E06

programme.title: 2002. Inuyasha e seu grupo aceitam um trabalho para se livrar dos macacos, que estão destruindo campos. Eles encontram três macacos, Gon, Bun e Ken. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Os Três Youkais do Deus Macaco
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E07

programme.title: 2002. Agome pega um resfriado e retorna aos dias atuais. Inuyasha está preocupado com ela. Ele reúne muitos alimentos nutritivos derrotando vários youkais. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: O Confronto Entre Inuyasha e Hojo
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E08

programme.title: 2002. O irmão mais novo de Agome, Sota, se apaixonou por Hitomi, uma colega de classe. Inicialmente, ele pede a Inuyasha um conselho, mas no final, ele decide dizer a ela que a ama com um plano orquestrado por Agome. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E09

programme.title: 2002. Tesso, um youkai de rato que tem medo de gatos, se transforma em um curandeiro e persegue Kuroro. Inuyasha e seu grupo encontram aldeões que confundem Kirara com Kuroro e tentam expulsá-la. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: O Espiritualista Mistérioso e a Kirara Negra
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E10

programme.title: 2002. Kikyo foi trazida de volta à vida por uma das técnicas secretas de Urasue. Ela conhece Monju, que está na mesma situação. Monju não tem almas suficientes. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E11

programme.title: 2002. Em uma certa aldeia, Inuyasha e sua equipe estão cercados por aldeões que não gostam de Mirok. Quando eles perguntam por que, eles dizem que Mirok tem feito muitas más ações. Mirok diz que ele é inocente, e suspeita que isso seja obra de um impostor... Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E12

programme.title: 2002. Inuyasha e sua equipe se encontram com Izumo, que está investigando o segredo da criação da Jóia. Eles ouvem que um youkai apareceu e vão investigar uma aldeia próxima. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Os Criadores da Jóia de Quatro Almas: Parte 1
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E13

programme.title: 2002. Agome e os outros são sequestrados por youkais que estão usando falsas Jóias. Inuyasha vai salvá-los, mas Gyu-Oh fica em seu caminho. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Os Criadores da Jóia de Quatro Almas: Parte 2
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E14

programme.title: 2002. Os insetos venenosos de Narak aparecem. Sesshomaru vai atrás deles. Enquanto isso, Jaken é picado por um inseto venenoso e está morrendo. Rin fica com ele e tenta salvá-lo. Ela vai ao campo de Jinenji para obter um fruto do Sennenso. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E15

programme.title: 2003. Kirara desaparece e Sango está preocupada. Shippo deduz as razões de Kirara para desaparecer e culpa Inuyasha. Naquele momento, um som estrondoso vem da floresta. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E16

programme.title: 2003. Agome é atraída para uma caverna por uma voz pedindo ajuda. Ao entrar ela encontra Kikyo, que não tem almas suficientes e enfraqueceu-se. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Kikyo e Kagome Sozinhas Numa Caverna
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E17

programme.title: 2003. Ginta e Hakkaku brigam com Kuga e acabam trabalhando separadamente. Ao fazer isso, eles encontram o grupo de Sesshomaru. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Kuga e Sesshomaru, O Perigoso Confronto
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E18

programme.title: 2003. Garamaru, um youkai mariposa, prendeu Agome e os outros em um casulo e agora eles estão presos em seus pesadelos. Na vida real, Inuyasha está lutando sozinho. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Pesadelo Real! A Luta na Floresta do Desespero
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T05E01

programme.title: 2003. A neve está caindo fora de época. Mirok é sequestrado por Koyuki, uma mulher misteriosa. Agome e os outros ouvem de um caçador e sua esposa sobre um youkai da neve. Quando eles vão procurá-lo, eles encontram Sango, que se perdeu. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Sete Anos Depois; As Neves Eternas
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T05E02

programme.title: 2003. Um ogro gigante chamado Kyokotsu aparece nas montanhas ao norte e devora outros youkais como a tribo de lobos. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Os Youkais Lobos são Atacados por um Zumbi
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T05E03

programme.title: 2003. O Exército dos Sete foi trazido de volta à vida. O calvário enviado para derrotá-los é dizimado pelo segundo mais forte, Yakotsu. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T05E04

programme.title: 2003. A luta entre Yakotsu e Inuyasha é interrompida quando Mukotsu interfere. Mukotsu sequestra Agome para torná-la sua noiva. Mirok e Sango tentam salvá-la, mas o veneno de Mukotsu os impede de se mover. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T05E05

programme.title: 2003. Agome, Mirok e Sango foram enfraquecidos pelo veneno de Mukotsu. Inuyasha tenta os ajudar. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T05E06

programme.title: 2003. No templo, Inuyasha verifica se Agome e os outros estão seguros. Ele acaba confiando em Renkotsu e Ginkotsu o bombardeia. Inuyasha os enfrenta, mas Renkotsu rouba os fragmentos. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T05E07

programme.title: 2003. Agome, Mirok e Sango pararam de respirar. Inuyasha procura pelo Exército dos Sete para vingá-los. Ele vê Sesshomaru e se certifica de que é uma ilusão. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T05E08

programme.title: 2003. Inuyasha e seu grupo se aproximam da luz de um fragmento da Jóia que parece pertencer ao Exército, mas a luz não emana energia maligna. Suikotsu, um bom médico é o dono do fragmento... Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T05E09

programme.title: 2003. A personalidade má de Suikotsu desperta e luta contra Inuyasha. Quando as crianças o chamam para voltar a ser quem ele era, Suikotsu sente uma forte dor. Bankotsu decidiu retirar-se da vila. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T05E10

programme.title: 2003. Há uma barreira ao redor do Monte Hakurei que purifica os youkais ou qualquer coisa maligna. Inuyasha e os outros pensam que Narak não pode estar se escondendo no Monte e vão procurar uma pista diferente. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: O Líder do Exército dos Sete! Bankotsu Entra em Cena
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T05E11

programme.title: 2003. A batalha entre Bankotsu e Inuyasha começa. Enquanto isso, Sesshomaru chega ao Monte Hakurei. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T05E12

programme.title: 2003. Há uma ilha sagrada em um lago cercado por névoa. Hakushin, que se tornou um Buda vivo há cem anos, é venerado lá. Mas algo estranho acontece. O pai de um garoto chamado Shintaro vai investigar, mas ele não volta. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: A Barreira Energética da Ilha Hijiri
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T05E13

programme.title: 2003. Bankotsu sequestra Agome e os outros envolvidos em sua batalha contra Inuyasha. Inuyasha está fica irritado por ver que seus amigos estão se machucando. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: O Topo Sagrado e o Segredo da Múmia
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T05E14

programme.title: 2003. A barreira sagrada de Monte Hakurei impede que os youkais entrem nele. Hakushin ajuda Narak e coloca a barreira. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T05E15

programme.title: 2003. Monte Hakurei fica mais forte, e Kikyo é impedida de entrar em seu solo sagrado. Kikyo deixa a aldeia de Chiyo, mas vai atrás do Bankotsu para ver o que o Exército dos Sete está fazendo. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T05E16

programme.title: 2003. Suikotsu não pode matar Chiyo e os outros. Após isso, Suikotsu e Jakotsu vão para dentro do local sagrado e esperam por Sesshomaru. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T05E17

programme.title: 2003. Ginkotsu morre e Renkotsu usa seu fragmento sem permissão. Ao fazê-lo, ele traiu Bankotsu. Ele deseja ainda mais poder e ataca Kuga para que ele possa pegar os fragmentos da Jóia. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T05E18

programme.title: 2003. O mal dentro do Monte Hakurei são os youkais de Narak. Mirok arrisca sua vida para salvar Sango e suga todos os youkais com seu ataque junto com os insetos venenosos e entra em colapso. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T05E19

programme.title: 2003. Mirok e Sango ficam cara a cara com a múmia de Hakushin no Monte Hakurei. O santo diz a eles o motivo de ajudar Narak. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T05E20

programme.title: 2003. Inuyasha recupera seus poderes, derrota Jakotsu e se apressa para o Monte Hakurei. Renkotsu tem sentimentos rebeldes em relação ao Bankotsu. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T05E21

programme.title: 2003. A barreira do Monte Hakurei desaparece e Inuyasha está preocupado com a Agome, que vai para o Monte com Kuga e os outros. Enquanto isso, Kikyo e Sesshomaru sentiram que algo estranho aconteceu em diferentes locais. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Batalha Decisiva! O Último e Mais Forte dos Guerreiros Zumbis
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T05E22

programme.title: 2003. Mirok e Sango veem um misterioso pedaço de carne nas profundezas do Monte Hakurei. Sesshomaru e Kikyo sentem algo estranho acontecendo em diferentes locais e seguem para o Monte Hakurei. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: A Poderosa Banryu; Duelo Mortal no Monte Hakurei
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T05E23

programme.title: 2003. Narak ganhou um novo corpo e renasceu. Inuyasha tenta derrotá-lo com seu ataque, mas ele se defende e fere Agome, Mirok e os outros. Enquanto isso, Kikyo vê Kagura escapando do Monte Hakurei. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T05E24

programme.title: 2003. O Monte Hakurei é destruído e Kuga acaba caindo, mas Inuyasha o salva. Quando ele se encontra com Agome e os outros, que estão tentando escapar o mais rápido possível, ele vê uma ilusão de Kikyo. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T05E25

programme.title: 2003. Inuyasha é afastado de seus amigos quando é enganado por informações falsas de que Kikyo ainda está viva. Enquanto isso, Agome e os outros estão em uma certa cidade do castelo e são capturados. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: A Escuridão do Coração de Agome
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T05E26

programme.title: 2003. O bebê de Narak guia Agome para um templo abandonado. Ele ordena que Kagura coloque um fragmento corrompido da Jóia nela, mas Agome recupera a consciência. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T05E27

programme.title: Twisted Dish - Leveled Up Lasagna!
programme.desc: Chef teaches viewers how to remake world-famous dishes and cocktails with a twist using local ingredients.

programme.title: Twisted Dish - Deep Fried Chicken Fajita Stuffed Poblano Peppers

programme.title: Twisted Dish - Everything Apps; Raising a Little Kale!
programme.desc: Chef teaches viewers how to remake world-famous dishes and cocktails with a twist using local ingredients.

programme.title: Twisted Dish - Soul Food inspired Take Out
programme.desc: Chef teaches viewers how to remake world-famous dishes and cocktails with a twist using local ingredients.

programme.title: Love Will Find a Way
programme.desc: Reggie's search for love continues in Paris with Troy and Piper.

programme.title: Love Dodoma
programme.desc: In the blue water waves of Mafia Island, Tanzania, a love story begins; Malick and Dodoma are dedicated islanders who believe true love is a gift.

programme.title: Family Time - No Lie Zone
programme.desc: Tony and Lisa ban all lying in the household, including the little white lies that hold the family together.

programme.title: Family Time - Lisa's Leftovers
programme.desc: Lisa gets upset when her sister Lori begins dating her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: Family Time - Powering Down
programme.desc: Tony feels his family is drifting apart so he bans technology in the household.

programme.title: Family Time - The Oops Baby
programme.desc: Tony and Lisa must deal with the possibility of a new baby.

programme.title: Family Time - Cut It Out
programme.desc: Tony spends time in the local barbershop with friends; Lori considers her options for having a baby.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Manchild in Vanessa Land
programme.desc: Bernie learns Vanessa has a boyfriend, Rahim, who is 18 years old; when he discovers that the teen has a child, he hits the ceiling.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - You Don't Know Squad
programme.desc: Vanessa tries to increase her chances of being accepted into a college by joining the drill team, which pleases Bernie until he sees one of the squad's provocative routines.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - You Got Served
programme.desc: Bernie is sued for being a negligent parent after a birthday bash for Bryana results in broken bones.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - I Don't Wanna Be a Playa No More
programme.desc: When Jordan develops a crush on a girl at school, Bernie takes it upon himself to teach Jordan how to be a player and get the girl.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - The Big Picture
programme.desc: Jordan's prank anonymous phone calls have surprising consequences.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - No Free Samples
programme.desc: Rap artist Lil' Bow Wow (guest starring as himself) wants to sample an old hit of Steve's (Steve Harvey) group, the Hi-Tops. Jermaine Dupri and Ron Isley also guest star.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Mother and Child Reunion
programme.desc: Romeo's mother shows up and announces that she is leaving her husband to start a new life in Chicago.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Here Comes the Judge
programme.desc: When Steve's students take him court for a classroom injustice, he goes before TV's Judge Greg Mathis.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - House Party
programme.desc: Cedric and Lovita pressure apartment-sitting Romeo to throw a party while Steve and Regina are out of town.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Don't Stand Too Close to Me
programme.desc: Steve leads Regina's teen-feminist discussion group; Cedric and Lovita socialize with another couple.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Wedlocked
programme.desc: On Cedric and Lovita's (Cedric The Entertainer, Terri J. Vaughn) wedding day, Steve (Steve Harvey) and the groom find themselves locked in a basement.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - African-American Gigolo
programme.desc: Steve and Regina set each other up with blind dates; Cedric's basketball game rituals drive the others crazy.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - If Cooks Could Kill
programme.desc: Emotions boil over when Steve and Cedric (Steve Harvey, Cedric The Entertainer) compete against Regina and Lovita (Wendy Raquel Robinson, Terri J. Vaughn) in a cooking contest.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - I Believe I Can Lie

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - Got It From My Mama Mia

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - New Orleans Flavor

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - Family Cook Off
programme.desc: Today's episode is a family affair, Yo-Yo puts Mama Mia in charge in the kitchen, and Mama Mia does just that ! She cracks the whip to Yo-Yo and her sister April get ready to help prepare Mama Mia's famous spaghetti and spicy meatballs.

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - Caribbean Flavors

programme.desc: In an insurance scam, a man fakes his death and sets his wife up to take the blame. After serving 10 years in prison, she sets out to get revenge, immune from the law since she cannot be re-prosecuted for the same crime.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: A dangerous plan begins to take shape; how much is Boyd willing to risk for the chance to get everyone home?; Fatima and Henry find themselves at two very different and disturbing crossroads; Victor helps Tabitha and Ethan prepare for the worst.

programme.title: A Quiet Place: Day One (2024)
programme.desc: When New York City comes under attack from an alien invasion, a woman and other survivors try to find a way to safety. They soon learn that they must remain absolutely silent as the mysterious creatures are drawn to the slightest sound.

programme.title: Carrie (2013)
programme.desc: Tormented by her peers and sheltered by her religious mother (Julianne Moore), an awkward teenager (Chloë Grace Moretz) unleashes her hidden, telekinetic powers after a sick prank at her senior prom pushes her over the edge.

programme.title: Child's Play (1988)
programme.desc: A struggling single mother unknowingly gifts her son a doll imbued with a serial killer's consciousness.

programme.title: The Woman in Black (2012)
programme.desc: A widowed lawyer (Daniel Radcliffe) encounters ghostly goings-on at the foreboding estate of a recently deceased client.

programme.title: Neil Young: Heart of Gold (2006)
programme.desc: Filmmaker Jonathan Demme captures the rocker in concert before a live audience at Ryman Auditorium in Nashville, Tenn.

programme.title: Lady Jane (1986)
programme.desc: Teenage Lady Jane Grey (Helena Bonham Carter) rules England briefly with lusty Lord Dudley (Cary Elwes) in the royal confusion of 1553.

programme.title: To Catch a Thief (1955)
programme.desc: A retired cat burglar (Cary Grant) sees fireworks with an American heiress (Grace Kelly) on the Riviera.

programme.title: Baywatch (2017)
programme.desc: When a dangerous crime wave hits the beach, Mitch Buchannon leads his elite squad of lifeguards on a mission to prove that you don't have to wear a badge to save the bay.

programme.title: Novocaine (2025)
programme.desc: When the girl of his dreams gets kidnapped, a man turns his inability to feel pain into an unexpected advantage. He fights a bunch of thugs to get her back.

programme.title: The Heartbreak Kid (2007)
programme.desc: After his new bride reveals her nasty nature, a man (Ben Stiller) meets the woman (Michelle Monaghan) who may be his real soul mate and tries to woo her.

programme.title: Valley Girl (1983)
programme.desc: A girl from the San Fernando Valley falls for a Hollywood punk, much to the dismay of her social-conscious friends. Ultimately, though, she decides to forgo popularity for true love.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch Movie (1995)
programme.desc: The original 70s TV family is now placed in the 1990s, where they're even more square and out of place than ever.

programme.title: Throw Momma From the Train (1987)
programme.desc: Two writers mistake a series of tit-for-tat murders, confusing one's ex-wife for the other's beastly mother.

programme.title: Stripes (1981)
programme.desc: A lazy New York cabby (Bill Murray) quits his job and convinces his bored buddy (Harold Ramis) they should join the Army.

programme.title: Airplane! (1980)
programme.desc: A pilot (Robert Hays) afraid to fly follows his stewardess ex-girlfriend (Julie Hagerty) and must take over for the poisoned crew.

programme.title: The Naked Gun (2025)
programme.desc: Following in the footsteps of his bumbling father, Detective Frank Drebin Jr. must solve a murder case to prevent Police Squad from shutting down.

programme.title: Barbershop (2002)
programme.desc: The owner of a popular barbershop considers selling the place to a loan shark who wants to convert it into a strip club.

programme.title: Children of the Corn II: The Final Sacrifice (1992)
programme.sub-title: Children of the Corn II: The Final Sacrifice (1992)
programme.desc: A newsman (Terence Knox) and his son (Paul Scherrer) snoop around a Nebraska town where children kill many adults.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: A dangerous plan begins to take shape; how much is Boyd willing to risk for the chance to get everyone home?; Fatima and Henry find themselves at two very different and disturbing crossroads; Victor helps Tabitha and Ethan prepare for the worst.

programme.title: Birdman of Alcatraz (1962)
programme.desc: Murderer Robert Stroud (Burt Lancaster) spends decades in solitary confinement studying birds and their diseases.

programme.title: The Horse Soldiers (1959)
programme.desc: Set during the Civil War, Colonel John Marlowe leads a Union Calvary brigade on a mission behind Confederate lines to destroy enemy railroads and supplies. The colonel is confronted with numerous challenges before reaching Union held Baton Rouge.

programme.title: Max 2: White House Hero (2017)
programme.desc: Max, a military service dog, is assigned to serve on the U.S. president's Secret Service detail.

programme.title: Unhuman (2022)
programme.desc: Seven misfit students must band together against a growing gang of unhuman savages. Their trust in each other gets tested to the limit in a brutal, horrifying fight to survive as they take down the murderous zombie creatures.

programme.title: There's Something Wrong With the Children (2023)
programme.sub-title: There's Something Wrong With the Children (2023)
programme.desc: Margaret and Ben take a weekend trip with two longtime friends and their two young children. Ben soon suspects something sinister is afoot when the kids start behaving strangely after disappearing into the woods overnight.

programme.title: Chocolat (2000)
programme.desc: The mayor opposes a single mother (Juliette Binoche) who is opening a chocolate shop in his 1950s French village across from a church during Lent.

programme.title: Igby Goes Down (2002)
programme.desc: A teen (Kieran Culkin) from a dysfunctional family runs away from a military academy to live with his godfather (Jeff Goldblum) in New York City.

programme.title: Foul Play (1978)
programme.desc: A San Francisco police detective (Chevy Chase) protects a librarian (Goldie Hawn) who knows too much about a plot to kill the pope.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: A dangerous plan begins to take shape; how much is Boyd willing to risk for the chance to get everyone home?; Fatima and Henry find themselves at two very different and disturbing crossroads; Victor helps Tabitha and Ethan prepare for the worst.

programme.title: Election (1999)
programme.desc: Tracy faces no competition in her high school election, but the civics teacher intervenes by encouraging the varsity football player to run for president, resulting in chaos.

programme.title: Beautiful Girls (1996)
programme.desc: The opposite sex preoccupies working-class pals gathered for their high-school reunion in small-town Massachusetts.

programme.title: Cadillac Man (1990)
programme.desc: An angry husband (Tim Robbins) catches up to a wise-guy car salesman (Robin Williams) who cons customers and women.

programme.title: Lifeforce (1985)
programme.desc: A space commander (Steve Railsback) and a Scotland Yard inspector (Peter Firth) search for a naked space vampire (Mathilda May) loose in London.

programme.title: 3:10 to Yuma (1957)
programme.desc: A rancher (Van Heflin) needing cash is hired to put an outlaw (Glenn Ford) on the train to Yuma prison.

programme.title: Chato's Land (1972)
programme.desc: An Apache (Charles Bronson) kills a sheriff and then, one by one, members of a posse led by an ex-Rebel officer (Jack Palance).

programme.title: The Duellists (1977)
programme.desc: Two French officers wage a long-running feud during the Napoleonic wars. Based on a Joseph Conrad story.

programme.title: True Grit (1969)
programme.desc: One-eyed Marshal "Rooster" Cogburn (John Wayne) and a Texas Ranger (Glen Campbell) help a girl (Kim Darby) find her father's killer.

programme.title: 2 Days in the Valley (1996)
programme.desc: A hit man (Danny Aiello) falls for an art dealer's helper (Glenne Headly) amid confusion in the San Fernando Valley.

programme.title: Here After (2024)
programme.desc: Claire is overjoyed when her daughter, Robin, is miraculously revived after a fatal accident. However, her relief soon turns to dread as she starts to suspect that something dark has followed Robin back from the brink of death.

programme.title: Desperate Hours (1990)
programme.desc: An escaped convict (Mickey Rourke) and his two partners invade the home of an estranged Utah couple (Anthony Hopkins, Mimi Rogers).

programme.title: The Babysitter (1995)
programme.desc: An alluring teenage sitter (Alicia Silverstone) becomes the object of her suburban clients' dreams and obsessions.

programme.title: No Country for Old Men (2007)
programme.desc: An aging lawman (Tommy Lee Jones) reflects on his past and laments a changing world while trying to find and protect a hunter who took the cash from a drug deal gone bad.

programme.title: Undisputed (2002)
programme.desc: An undefeated world-champion prizefighter, who is convicted of rape and sent to prison, must confront and fight the reigning prison boxing champion.

programme.title: Quantum of Solace (2008)
programme.desc: James Bond's (Daniel Craig) hunt for those responsible for Vesper Lynd's death leads him to a ruthless businessman (Mathieu Amalric) who is plotting to seize control of a valuable resource.

programme.title: Virtuosity (1995)
programme.desc: An ex-cop doing prison time chases a virtual-reality killer from the program onto the Los Angeles streets.

programme.title: John Carpenter's Escape From L.A. (1996)
programme.desc: The fascist U.S. president enlists a jailed war hero (Kurt Russell) to retrieve a top-secret device stolen by his daughter on island Los Angeles in 2013.

programme.title: Killerman (2019)
programme.desc: Moe Diamond is a New York City money launderer who wakes up with no memory and millions of dollars in stolen cash and drugs. He must soon scour the streets in search of answers while trying to dodge a crew of violent and crooked cops.

programme.title: Friday the 13th (1980)
programme.desc: The reopening of Camp Crystal Lake spells murder and mayhem for a group of sexually promiscuous counselors.

programme.title: Borrego (2022)
programme.desc: After witnessing a drug mule's plane crash in the Borrego desert, Elly is kidnapped and forced on a dangerous journey to a remote drop-off point.

programme.title: Before Dawn (2024)
programme.desc: A young man joins his countrymen on the Western front of World War I, hoping to expedite an end to the bloody conflict. However, as the battle rages on, he's forced to grapple with the brutal realities of trench warfare.

programme.title: The Return (2024)
programme.desc: After 20 years away, Odysseus washes up on the shores of Ithaca. The king finds much has changed since he left to fight in the Trojan War. No longer the mighty warrior his people remember, Odysseus must face his past to save his family.

programme.title: Freedom's Path (2022)
programme.desc: When Union soldier William runs from battle, he's taken to safety by a heroic young Black man. Kitch is part of a secret community of freed slaves running a section of the Underground Railroad, but a desperate slave catcher is on their trail.

programme.title: Slingshot (2024)
programme.desc: An astronaut struggles to maintain his grip on reality during a possibly compromised mission to Saturn's moon, Titan.

programme.title: Snag (2023)
programme.desc: After learning the woman he once loved is being held captive by ruthless gangsters, a lone wolf seeks out allies and storms into a world of violence to rescue her.

programme.title: Heist 88 (2023)
programme.desc: A criminal mastermind decides to pull one last job before going to prison and recruits a group of young bank employees to steal millions in a daring and brazen assault on the U.S. banking system.

programme.title: Sahara (2005)
programme.desc: A treasure hunter (Matthew McConaughey) and his sidekick (Steve Zahn) join forces with a doctor (Penélope Cruz) to search for a Confederate ship in Africa.

programme.title: Clear and Present Danger (1994)
programme.desc: An acting CIA chief (Harrison Ford) learns the president has triggered a war with Colombian drug cartels.

programme.title: Super (2010)
programme.desc: After his wife (Liv Tyler) leaves him, a fry cook (Rainn Wilson) emulates a TV superhero and transforms himself into a costumed vigilante.

programme.title: Frank Miller's Sin City: A Dame to Kill For (2014)
programme.sub-title: Frank Miller's Sin City: A Dame to Kill For (2014)
programme.desc: In the central story, Dwight McCarthy (Josh Brolin) struggles with his inner demons and tries to maintain control until his former lover, Ava Lord (Eva Green), returns wanting his help to escape her abusive husband.

programme.title: Scary Movie V (2013)
programme.desc: Bizarre activity follows after a husband and wife bring their newborn baby home from the hospital. Realizing that a demon is stalking their family, they consult paranormal experts and install numerous cameras to drive the spirit out.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity: The Ghost Dimension (2015)
programme.desc: An old and mysterious camcorder leads to the discovery of a supernatural terror in a family's new home.

programme.title: Sexipede (2017)
programme.desc: Beautiful women make your erotic dreams come true.

programme.title: The Girl in the Pool (2024)
programme.desc: A man's life collapses when his mistress is found dead in his pool. Terrified of the consequences and desperate to protect his family, he conceals the truth, triggering a chaotic night that threatens to unravel his perfect life.

programme.title: Star Trek: Section 31 (2025)
programme.desc: Emperor Philippa Georgiou faces the sins of her past after joining a secret division of Starfleet that's tasked with protecting the United Federation of Planets.

programme.title: Scary Movie 4 (2006)
programme.desc: Dim-witted Cindy Campbell (Anna Faris) and her sex-crazed friend, Brenda (Regina Hall), team up with cute-but-clueless Tom Ryan (Craig Bierko) to save the world from a hostile alien invasion.

programme.title: The Night Clerk (2020)
programme.desc: A hotel clerk becomes the prime suspect when a woman is murdered during his shift. As the police investigation closes in, he makes a personal connection with a guest -- but soon realizes he must stop the killer before she becomes the next victim.

programme.title: The Presidio (1988)
programme.desc: An Army provost marshal (Sean Connery) clashes with a detective (Mark Harmon) over a murder at the San Francisco military base.

programme.title: The Running Man (1987)
programme.desc: A police-state scapegoat (Arnold Schwarzenegger) must play a TV host's (Richard Dawson) deadly game show for the 21st-century masses.

programme.title: Ali (2001)
programme.desc: Muhammad Ali (Will Smith) battles Sonny Liston, Joe Frazier and George Foreman and raises controversy outside the ring.

programme.title: The Gambler (2014)
programme.desc: A literature professor (Mark Wahlberg) with gambling debts borrows money from a mobster (Michael Kenneth Williams) and offers his life as collateral while immersing himself in an illicit, underground world.

programme.title: No Country for Old Men (2007)
programme.desc: An aging lawman (Tommy Lee Jones) reflects on his past and laments a changing world while trying to find and protect a hunter who took the cash from a drug deal gone bad.

programme.title: Get Rich or Die Tryin' (2005)
programme.desc: When his world spirals out of control, a drug dealer wants to leave his violent life behind and pursue his dream of becoming a rap artist. He channels the same manic intensity to his writing as he does to dealing.

programme.title: Paid in Full (2002)
programme.desc: A dry cleaner's delivery boy becomes one of the most powerful drug dealers in the 1980s Harlem. Based on a true story.

programme.title: Gasoline Alley (2022)
programme.desc: Set in the underbelly of Los Angeles, a man is drawn into a high-profile triple murder. The two police detectives on his tail soon join him in attempting to uncover an explosive conspiracy.

programme.title: Grudge Match (2013)
programme.desc: A boxing promoter (Kevin Hart) offers two rival boxers (Robert De Niro, Sylvester Stallone) the chance to come out of retirement for one final bout.

programme.title: Harlem Nights (1989)
programme.desc: Business partners resisting a white mobster trying to take over their nightclub in the 1930s Harlem.

programme.title: Ali (2001)
programme.desc: Muhammad Ali (Will Smith) battles Sonny Liston, Joe Frazier and George Foreman and raises controversy outside the ring.

programme.title: Dreamland (2019)
programme.desc: A teen bounty hunter is torn between helping or capturing a seductive fugitive bank robber hiding in his small town during the Great Depression.

programme.title: Kickback (2022)
programme.desc: A documentary following the decades-long crusade of investigative journalist Andrew Jennings to expose corruption inside FIFA, football's sole governing body and the largest sports organization in the world.

programme.title: Masterminds (2016)
programme.desc: An armored-car driver (Zach Galifianakis) helps a flirty co-worker (Kristen Wiig) and her friends pull off a heist, then finds himself holding the bag after they double-cross him.

programme.title: Scream (1996)
programme.desc: A psycho killer targets a past victim's daughter (Neve Campbell), while a tabloid TV reporter (Courteney Cox) homes in on his identity.

programme.title: Scream 2 (1997)
programme.desc: A masked killer continues to pursue a California student (Neve Campbell) and her friends at an Ohio college.

programme.title: Scream 3 (2000)
programme.desc: Murders draw a young woman (Neve Campbell), a reporter (Courteney Cox Arquette) and an ex-policeman (David Arquette) to the set of a movie inspired by horrific events that they survived.

programme.title: The Guilt Trip (2012)
programme.desc: Pressured into taking his overbearing mother along for the ride, a man embarks on the road trip of a lifetime.

programme.title: Waking Up in Reno (2002)
programme.desc: A married man (Billy Bob Thornton) has an affair with his best friend's wife (Charlize Theron) while both couples travel from Arkansas to Nevada.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary (2001)
programme.desc: An outrageous British woman (Renée Zellweger) decides to take control of her life, but instead falls for two very different men (Colin Firth, Hugh Grant).

programme.title: Chocolat (2000)
programme.desc: The mayor opposes a single mother (Juliette Binoche) who is opening a chocolate shop in his 1950s French village across from a church during Lent.

programme.title: Life During Wartime (2009)
programme.desc: Ten years after going through traumatic personal crises, three sisters still find it difficult to move on with their lives and find real happiness.

programme.title: Failure to Launch (2006)
programme.desc: The parents of a young man (Matthew McConaughey) who still lives at home hire a beautiful woman (Sarah Jessica Parker) to entice him to finally leave the nest.

programme.title: Wishful Thinking (1996)
programme.desc: A young woman (Drew Barrymore) falls for her best friend (James LeGros) while he looks for the man his girlfriend (Jennifer Beals) is having an affair with.

programme.title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.sub-title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.desc: A globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) must find Pandora's box before a maniacal scientist (Ciarán Hinds) can harness its power for world domination.

programme.title: Tabloid (2010)
programme.desc: In the 1970s, former Miss Wyoming Joyce McKinney becomes obsessed with a Mormon acquaintance and flies to England to abduct him after he goes there for missionary work.

programme.title: End of Sentence (2019)
programme.desc: After being released from prison, a young man reluctantly embarks on a journey with his estranged father to spread his mother's ashes in her native Ireland.

programme.title: Winter Spring Summer or Fall (2024)
programme.desc: Young Remi has her future figured out, until she meets Barnes, who lives for the moment and makes her question everything. As their love story unfolds, she faces a choice -- stick to her plan or risk it all for a life she never saw coming.

programme.title: Backcountry (2014)
programme.desc: A couple (Missy Peregrym, Jeff Roop) on a deep-wilderness hike become hopelessly lost within an aggressive black bear's territory.

programme.title: Run (2025)
programme.desc: Smugglers, the police, locals and tourists get drawn into a dangerous web of survival, sacrifice and shifting loyalties as Europe faces a surge in migration.

programme.title: Heatwave (2022)
programme.desc: A woman's life takes an unexpected turn when she falls for her boss's wife. She must soon defend herself as she becomes entangled in a web of malice.

programme.title: Last Weekend (2014)
programme.desc: Petty squabbling marks the Memorial Day reunion of an affluent matriarch (Patricia Clarkson) and her dysfunctional family (Chris Mulkey, Zachary Booth).

programme.title: The Wedding Banquet (2025)
programme.desc: Hoping to stay in the country, a gay man proposes a green card marriage to a female friend in exchange for paying for her IVF treatment. However, things get complicated when his grandmother surprises them with an extravagant Korean wedding banquet.

programme.title: Election (1999)
programme.desc: Tracy faces no competition in her high school election, but the civics teacher intervenes by encouraging the varsity football player to run for president, resulting in chaos.

programme.title: Sarafina! (1992)
programme.desc: A South African student (Leleti Khumalo) joins the anti-apartheid revolution in her township of Soweto.

programme.title: Doin' It (2024)
programme.desc: Moonlighting as a high-school substitute teacher, a 30-year-old virgin gets in over her head when she's assigned to teach sex education.

programme.title: Tabloid (2010)
programme.desc: In the 1970s, former Miss Wyoming Joyce McKinney becomes obsessed with a Mormon acquaintance and flies to England to abduct him after he goes there for missionary work.

programme.title: Queen Bees (2021)
programme.desc: While her house undergoes repairs, fiercely independent senior Helen temporarily moves into a nearby retirement community, where she encounters lusty widows, cutthroat bridge tournaments and a hotbed of bullying "mean girls."

programme.title: Jenny's Wedding (2015)
programme.desc: When Jenny (Katherine Heigl) decides to marry a woman (Alexis Bledel), her conventional family must accept who she is or risk losing her forever.

programme.title: The Kingmaker (2019)
programme.desc: Filmmaker Lauren Greenfield examines the controversial history of Filipino politician Imelda Marcos and her family.

programme.title: My Psychedelic Love Story (2020)
programme.desc: Filmmaker Errol Morris examines the love affair between LSD guru Timothy Leary and Joanna Harcourt-Smith.

programme.title: Regarding Us (2025)
programme.desc: After losing her teaching career, A transgender woman has a profound impact on the lives of two children.

programme.title: Parallel (2024)
programme.desc: Following the journey of Vanessa, a grief-stricken woman who mysteriously finds herself navigating between parallel spaces.

programme.title: The Friend (2024)
programme.desc: Iris finds her comfortable New York City life thrown into disarray after her closest friend and mentor bequeaths her a Great Dane named Apollo. Yet as Iris finds herself unexpectedly bonding with Apollo, she begins to come to terms with her past.

programme.title: Camp X-Ray (2014)
programme.desc: A female guard at Guantánamo Bay forms an unlikely friendship with one of the facility's longtime detainees.

programme.title: Borrego (2022)
programme.desc: After witnessing a drug mule's plane crash in the Borrego desert, Elly is kidnapped and forced on a dangerous journey to a remote drop-off point.

programme.title: Crisis (2021)
programme.desc: A drug trafficker organizes a smuggling operation while a recovering addict seeks the truth behind her son's disappearance.

programme.title: Raging Grace (2023)
programme.desc: Nothing is as it seems when an undocumented Filipina immigrant takes a job as a caretaker for a terminally ill man in a lavish home. She and her daughter soon become ensnared by a terrible secret that threatens to tear them apart.

programme.title: Cusp (2021)
programme.desc: Filmmakers Parker Hill and Isabel Bethencourt share a fascinating glimpse into authentic American girlhood, where the strictures of adolescence clash with the growing desire for personal agency.

programme.title: The Lovers (2014)
programme.desc: An impossible love blooms across two time periods and continents.

programme.title: Parallel (2024)
programme.desc: Following the journey of Vanessa, a grief-stricken woman who mysteriously finds herself navigating between parallel spaces.

programme.title: Memory (2023)
programme.desc: Social worker Sylvia's structured life is blown apart when Saul follows her home from their high school reunion. Their surprise encounter profoundly impacts both of them as they open the door to the past.

programme.title: An Unfinished Life (2005)
programme.desc: Old wounds get a chance to heal when a Wyoming rancher (Robert Redford) shelters his abused daughter-in-law (Jennifer Lopez) and her child.

programme.title: The Aviator (2004)
programme.desc: During the 1930s and '40s, wealthy industrialist Howard Hughes (Leonardo DiCaprio) gains fame as a movie producer, airplane designer and pilot.

programme.title: The English Patient (1996)
programme.desc: A Hungarian count's (Ralph Fiennes) fling with a British newlywed leads to tragedy in World War II North Africa.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby (2016)
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones (Renée Zellweger) must figure out which of the two men (Colin Firth, Patrick Dempsey) in her life is the father of her child.

programme.title: Kate & Leopold (2001)
programme.desc: A Manhattan woman (Meg Ryan) falls in love with the 19th-century Duke of Albany (Hugh Jackman) who has stepped through a time portal.
